restaurants.name: Carbone
tips: Be logged into Resy at 9:59 AM
Refresh at exactly 10:00:00 - seconds matter
No walk-ins accepted, ever
Set Resy notifications for cancellations

restaurants.name: Don Angie
restaurants.walkInTips: Walk-in list opens at 4:30 PM sharp. Arrive early, put name down, explore the neighborhood.
tips: SWITCHED TO OPENTABLE MAY 2025 - no longer on Resy
Reservations release 7 days in advance at 9 AM
Bar seats available for walk-ins
The Lasagna For Two is worth the effort

restaurants.name: Torrisi
restaurants.walkInTips: 12-seat bar for walk-ins (parties of 1-2 only). Show up at 4:15 PM for 5 PM seating. Weeknight waits can be 4+ hours.
tips: Same release as Carbone (Major Food Group)
Lunch reservations are easier to get
Bar is first-come, first-served

restaurants.name: 4 Charles Prime Rib
tips: $5/person reservation fee charged at booking
Very intimate brownstone setting
No high chairs or strollers
Reservations sell/trade on secondary market (against policy)
restaurants.signatureDish: Prime Rib (English, Charles, or King Cut)

restaurants.name: The Polo Bar
tips: Phone reservations ONLY - no online booking for prime times
Expect 30-60 minute hold times
Amex Platinum concierge can help
Try calling at 4 PM day-of for cancellations
Pre/post theater times available on OpenTable

restaurants.name: Atomix
restaurants.releaseDay: 1st of each month (entire month releases at once)
tips: Only 14 seats at the counter
$395-420/person prepaid at booking
Two Michelin stars, #8 World's 50 Best
Set calendar reminder for 1st of month at 2:55 PM

restaurants.name: Via Carota
restaurants.walkInTips: Most tables are walk-in. Arrive early (before 5 PM). Wait at Bar Pizzalino next door (same owners) - they'll text you.
tips: Walk-ins are the primary way to dine here
Sunday at 5 PM is a good time to try
Taylor Swift's favorite spot
The cacio e pepe is legendary

restaurants.name: Lilia
restaurants.walkInTips: Bar, patio, and piazza seats held for walk-ins. Arrive right at 4 PM when they open. Put name down for later slot.
tips: Call between 10 AM - 4 PM to speak to reservationist
Weekend reservations book within hours
Check Resy around 2 PM day-of for cancellations
Walk-in waits: 30 min to 3 hours

restaurants.name: Rao's
restaurants.walkInTips: Bar is open to public. Become a regular, chat up staff, and maybe get lucky.
tips: Tables are 'owned' by regulars and passed down through generations
Only 10 tables total (4 available to non-regulars)
Try the bar - it's your only realistic shot
Cash only if you somehow get in
Call the phone number listed on website for best chance

restaurants.name: The Corner Store
restaurants.walkInTips: 13-seat bar is first-come, first-served. Arrive before opening for best chance. Wait times 1-4 hours.
tips: Taylor Swift effect - exploded in popularity late 2024
Smart elegant dress code required
No parties larger than 4
Reservations disappear within seconds of release
Be ready at 9:55 AM on Resy

restaurants.name: Tatiana
restaurants.walkInTips: 6 bar seats + 32 patio seats for walk-ins. Arrive by 4:30 PM. Line forms early.
tips: #1 Restaurant in NYC (NYT 2024)
Prime 5-7 PM slots gone in minutes
700-2000 people on notify list daily
Try the 7:30-8 PM gap between seatings
Refresh Resy throughout day for cancellations

restaurants.name: Cote Korean Steakhouse
restaurants.walkInTips: Standing room only at bar. Undercote (downstairs bar) is walk-in only.
tips: Better luck with parties of 4-6 (table setup)
Two-tops only available at first/last seating
Michelin starred
Phone reservationists available 11 AM - 10 PM daily

restaurants.name: Le Bernardin
restaurants.walkInTips: Bar and lounge accept walk-ins for drinks and lighter fare
tips: Three Michelin stars
NOT on OpenTable - use Resy or call directly
Weekend dinner slots fill within hours
Lunch reservations much easier to get
Jacket required for men

restaurants.name: Le Veau d'Or
restaurants.walkInTips: 5-seat bar accepts walk-ins for drinks, lunch, or dinner
tips: Reopened July 2024 by Frenchette team
Only seats up to 4 per table in main dining room
Prix fixe $135/person dinner, $85 lunch
$50/seat fee if party size decreases after booking
James Beard Outstanding Restaurateur 2025

restaurants.name: The Four Horsemen
restaurants.walkInTips: Arrive at 5:30 PM opening for walk-in bar seats
tips: Co-owned by LCD Soundsystem's James Murphy
Exceptional natural wine program
Small plates meant for sharing
Early morning release time - set alarm for 6:55 AM

restaurants.name: Ha's Snack Bar
restaurants.walkInTips: Primarily walk-in. Line starts forming at 4:45 PM for 5:30 PM opening. Thursday at 9:30 PM quoted 4 hour wait.
tips: Midnight release time is unusual - set alarm
Very limited Resy availability - walk-in is often easier
Sister restaurant Bistrot Ha opened Dec 2025 at 137 Eldridge St
Very small space - 18 seats
